ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metadata_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the filter */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metadata object associated with the filter */,
  "metadata_version" INTEGER /* Version of the metadata object associated with the filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of the filter (e.g., date, text) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the metadata object associated with the filter
Version of the metadata object associated with the filter
Type of the filter (e.g., date, text)
Timestamp when the filter was created
ID of the user who created the filter
